articles.title: 'Beleaguered and bereft' - Mandelson messages reveal criticism of No 10
articles.description: Newly published documents show Lord Mandelson and ministers' concerns about the prime minister and Labour MPs.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Decision to appoint Mandelson continues to inflict damage
articles.description: When Sir Keir Starmer looks back on his time at No10, his decision to send Lord Mandelson to Washington will be a central part of the critique of his tenure.

articles.title: Weapons‑obsessed killer jailed as body cam footage shows victim being handcuffed
articles.description: University student Henry Nowak was killed as he walked back from a night out in Southampton.

articles.title: Lebanon says Hezbollah agrees reciprocal halt to attacks on Israel
articles.description: Israel's PM Netanyahu warns that strikes on Beirut will go ahead if Hezbollah does not abide by the US proposal.
